title: stelis popayanensis
intro: Stelis popayanensis is a rare orchid species native to the Andean region of Colombia, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. This plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis popayanensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Stelis popayanensis typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in traditional medicine.
